verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with some tasks being automated but human judgment and expertise still essential.

reasoning_steps.title: Task automation
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 3, and 6 can be automated using statistical analysis and probability tables.

reasoning_steps.title: Human judgment and expertise
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 2, 4, 7, 8, 9, 10, and 11 require human judgment and expertise in risk management and financial planning.

adjacent_careers.name: Risk Manager
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both actuaries and risk managers work with financial data to manage risk, but risk managers focus more on operational risks.

adjacent_careers.name: Financial Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Financial analysts analyze financial data to make predictions about future trends, but they do not have the same level of expertise in risk management as actuaries.

recent_developments.headline: Actuaries to play key role in climate change mitigation
recent_developments.impact: The increasing focus on climate change will require actuaries to have expertise in environmental risk management.

recent_developments.headline: Banks roll out AI copilots to analysts and traders
recent_developments.impact: JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman now offer LLM tools to thousands of frontline staff.

quotes.quote: AI is going to change every job. Every single job. Some jobs it will eliminate, some jobs it will improve, and some jobs it will create.
quotes.speaker: Jamie Dimon
quotes.title: CEO, JPMorgan Chase

quotes.quote: Two-thirds of jobs in the United States and Europe are exposed to some degree of AI automation, and roughly a quarter of current work could be done by generative AI.
quotes.speaker: Joseph Briggs and Devesh Kodnani
quotes.title: Economists, Goldman Sachs Research
quotes.source: Goldman Sachs report: The Potentially Large Effects of AI on Economic Growth

quotes.quote: Generative AI could add the equivalent of 2.6 to 4.4 trillion dollars in value annually across the global economy. Banking, high-tech, and life sciences capture the largest share.
quotes.speaker: McKinsey Global Institute
quotes.title: Research report
quotes.source: The Economic Potential of Generative AI
